sections.engagement_and_scope: Meridian Manufacturing Inc. (de-identified sample) - FY2026 (US GAAP, USD). Support working paper covering tie-out, sampling, and misstatement accumulation. No opinion is expressed.
sections.planning_and_materiality: Overall materiality 500000; performance materiality 375000; clearly-trivial threshold 25000; tolerable misstatement 300000. Values are inputs, not judgments.
sections.source_mapping_and_tieouts: 2 caption(s) tie to the trial balance within threshold; 1 difference(s) flagged for follow-up. Every tie-out cites its sources.
sections.sampling_approach: Monetary-unit sampling: interval 100000 (tolerable/reliability), random start 7. 2 key item(s) examined 100%; 9 residual selection(s). Examined coverage 81.7%.
sections.testing_results: 1 finding(s) recorded, each open for auditor evaluation and each carrying a citation. Results are evidence for the engagement team, not a conclusion.
sections.misstatement_summary: Aggregate accumulated misstatement 30000.0 vs. overall materiality 500000.0 (below-overall-materiality). Presented for auditor evaluation only.
sections.open_items_and_requests: Outstanding client requests and unresolved tie-out/mapping items are listed in open_items; obtain support before reliance.
sections.approvals_and_signoff: Preparer and engagement reviewer sign-off are recorded in approvals. Partner approval is required before any reliance or external delivery; this draft does not deliver, file, or submit anything.

findings.description: Accounts receivable caption differs from trial-balance support by 30000.0

misstatement_summary.note: Comparison is presented for auditor evaluation only. This is not a conclusion on the financial statements; the engagement team and partner must evaluate identified and uncorrected misstatements.

narrative: Draft working paper assembled from documented sources. Tie-outs, sampling, and misstatement accumulation are presented as evidence for auditor evaluation. No opinion, and no conclusion on fair presentation, materiality, or going concern, is stated. Partner approval is required before any reliance or external delivery.
standing_note: Draft audit working papers only. No audit opinion is expressed or implied; no conclusion on fair presentation, materiality, or going concern has been reached. Requires engagement-team review and partner approval before any reliance or external delivery.
